name: almondoo-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace published by almondoo.

plugins.name: configure-github-permissions
plugins.description: Interactively configure GitHub CLI (gh) permissions in .claude/settings.local.json via 10 categories × 3 choices (allow / ask / deny). Destructive categories (merge, release, workflow exec, gh api) default to deny.

plugins.name: parallel-audit
plugins.description: Event-driven multi-agent parallel audit of agent-instruction markdown files (CLAUDE.md / CLAUDE.local.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md / SKILL.md). Dispatches N independent subagents (default N=3, opt-in N=9), aggregates findings by reproducibility threshold, filters shared blind spots, classifies redundancy against Claude Code defaults or sibling skills, and proposes targeted fixes via per-fix user approval. Designed as a diagnostic tool for specific symptoms (post-refactor, rule being ignored, behavior drift, pre-shipping check), not for routine maintenance. Successor to claude-md-parallel-audit + skill-md-parallel-audit, unified under a target_type parameter.
